title: Visit
description: A scheduled visit with a person in DOC custody — the NET-NEW write surface. There is NO public API for scheduling a visit today: family/legal visits are arranged by phone, in person, or through the vendor visit-registration and tele-visit systems, and only aggregate counts appear on Open Data ('Local Law 85 – Visitation Quarterly', b3eu-nmy6). This schema serves both the read surface (list/get a visitor's own scheduled visits) and the VisitRequest write surface (schedule a visit).

visitId.description: Server-assigned visit confirmation number. Omit on create; returned on the created resource.

status.description: Lifecycle status. Set by DOC, not the requester.

personInCustody.description: The person being visited, identified by any live P.I.C. Lookup key.

name.description: Name of the person in custody.

relationship.description: Relationship to the person in custody (e.g. parent, spouse, attorney).

additionalVisitors.description: Number of additional visitors on the pass.

minorsIncluded.description: Whether minors will accompany the visitor (requires guardianship documentation).
